_meta.description: Canonical test fixtures for EP conformance testing. Any implementation claiming EP compatibility must produce identical outputs for these inputs.
_meta.hash_algorithm: SHA-256 over canonical JSON (sorted keys, no whitespace)

hash_fixtures.name: minimal_receipt
hash_fixtures.description: Minimal valid receipt with no context, no claims, no evidence, no chain link

hash_fixtures.name: with_context
hash_fixtures.description: Receipt with context keys, claims, and evidence — context must be included in hash

hash_fixtures.name: chained_receipt
hash_fixtures.description: Receipt chain-linked to a previous hash — chain linking must change the output

hash_fixtures.name: disputed_receipt
hash_fixtures.description: Disputed transaction with low signals — behavioral outcome is 'disputed'

scoring_fixtures.name: sybil_attack_5_fake_entities
scoring_fixtures.description: 5 perfect receipts from unestablished throwaway accounts should NOT produce a high score

scoring_fixtures.name: closed_loop_cluster
scoring_fixtures.description: Receipts from a closed-loop cluster (graph_weight 0.1) should produce minimal effective evidence

scoring_fixtures.name: unestablished_volume_cannot_establish
scoring_fixtures.description: 200 self-attested receipts from 200 unique unestablished submitters must NOT produce establishment or emerging confidence. This is a protocol invariant: pure unestablished volume cannot cross the trust barrier.

policy_fixtures.name: strict_no_data
policy_fixtures.description: Strict policy with no receipts must fail

policy_fixtures.name: discovery_minimal
policy_fixtures.description: Discovery policy allows entities with minimal data

policy_fixtures.name: standard_good_data
policy_fixtures.description: Standard policy with 20 good receipts from 5 submitters should pass

establishment_fixtures.name: not_established_low_evidence
establishment_fixtures.description: 5 receipts from unestablished submitters = effective evidence < 5.0 = NOT established

establishment_fixtures.name: established_credible_submitters
establishment_fixtures.description: 10 bilateral receipts from 4 established submitters with good scores = established

provenance_weight_fixtures.description: Any implementation must use these exact provenance multipliers

four_factor_weight_fixtures.name: unestablished_self_attested
four_factor_weight_fixtures.description: Worst-case receipt weight: unestablished submitter, self_attested provenance

four_factor_weight_fixtures.name: established_bilateral
four_factor_weight_fixtures.description: Strong receipt: established submitter (90), bilateral provenance

trust_profile_fixtures.name: canonical_5_receipt_profile
trust_profile_fixtures.description: Canonical trust profile from 5 receipts with mixed provenance. Any EP implementation must produce these exact outputs from these inputs.
